name: write_xdc
short_description: Writes constraints to a Xilinx Design Constraints (XDC) file. The default file extension for a XDC file is .xdc.
full_help:
write_xdc

Description: 
Writes constraints to a Xilinx Design Constraints (XDC) file. The default file extension for a XDC file is .xdc. 

Syntax: 
write_xdc  [-no_fixed_only] [-constraints <arg>] [-cell <arg>] [-sdc]
           [-no_tool_comments] [-force] [-exclude_timing] [-include_noc]
           [-exclude_physical] [-add_netlist_placement]
           [-logic_function_stripped] [-type <args>] [-write_id]
           [-exclude_cells <args>] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<file>]

Usage: 
  Name                        Description
  ---------------------------------------
  [-no_fixed_only]            Export fixed and non-fixed placement (by 
                              default only fixed placement is exported)
  [-constraints]              Include constraints that are flagged invalid
                              Values: valid, invalid, all
                              Default: valid
  [-cell]                     Hierarchical cell for which constraints are 
                              exported.
  [-sdc]                      Export all timing constriants in SDC compatible
                              format.
  [-no_tool_comments]         Don't write verbose tool generated comments to 
                              the xdc when translating from ucf.
  [-force]                    Overwrite existing file.
  [-exclude_timing]           Don't export timing constraints.
  [-include_noc]              Export NOC constraints.
  [-exclude_physical]         Don't export physical constraints.
  [-add_netlist_placement]    Export netlist placement constraints.
  [-logic_function_stripped]  Write disable_timing constraints which are 
                              associated with having previously run 
                              write_edif with its -logic_function_stripped 
                              option.
  [-type]                     Types of constraint to export.
                              Values: timing, io, misc, waiver and physical, 
                              noc. If not specified, all constraints will be 
                              exported.
  [-write_id]                 Write position number for timing constraints
  [-exclude_cells]            Don't export constraints scoped to or below the
                              specified hierarchical cell(s).
  [-quiet]                    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]                  Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<file>]                    Output constraints to the specified XDC file.

Categories: 
Timing, FileIO
